# IPCtk Front Page

IPCtk provides a header-only C++ IPC toolkit with IPC-L semantic flow specification and ITKD target mapping/generation.

## Navigation

| Category | Link |
|---|---|
| IPC-L standalone manual | [docs/IPC-L-Manual.md](IPC-L-Manual.md) |
| ITKD standalone manual | [docs/ITKD-Manual.md](ITKD-Manual.md) |
| Chapter 1 | [docs/manual/Chapter-1.md](manual/Chapter-1.md) |
| Chapter 2 | [docs/manual/Chapter-2.md](manual/Chapter-2.md) |
| Chapter 3 | [docs/manual/Chapter-3.md](manual/Chapter-3.md) |
| Chapter 4 | [docs/manual/Chapter-4.md](manual/Chapter-4.md) |
| Chapter 5 | [docs/manual/Chapter-5.md](manual/Chapter-5.md) |

| Chapter 7 | [docs/manual/Chapter-7.md](manual/Chapter-7.md) |
| Chapter 8 | [docs/manual/Chapter-8.md](manual/Chapter-8.md) |

## API and Sources

- C++ API reference source: `IPCtk.hpp`.
- DSL utility source: `DSLUtils.hpp`.
- examples: `examples/`.
- unit tests: `tests/unit/`.
- fuzz tests: `tests/fuzz/`.
